title: cremanthodium sino-oblongatum
intro: Cremanthodium sino-oblongatum, also known as the Sino-oblongate Cremanthodium, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower fever and treat various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. The health benefits of Cremanthodium sino-oblongatum include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help relieve coughs and reduce congestion. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and powdered extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
